title: New Deal request
stateLabel: State: request received, awaiting your response

earnings.heroNote: Paid out D+{days} after delivery confirmation · to your Stripe account
earnings.payoutNote: Paid out {days} days after delivery confirmed via secret code

coverage.title: PARCEL COVERAGE
coverage.shipperNoteExtended: {shipperFirstName} purchased insurance — you''re protected in case of value-related dispute.
coverage.shipperNoteExtendedShort: {shipperFirstName} bought 500 € insurance · you''re protected in case of dispute

acceptTip.title: Before accepting, read these points carefully
acceptTip.checkContent: **Always check the content** at parcel pickup. You have the right (and duty) to open and inspect.
acceptTip.refuseIfDiffers: **Refuse if actual content differs** from the declaration. You''ll be protected, {shipperFirstName} will be refunded.
acceptTip.takePhotos: **Take your own photos** at pickup. They count as proof in case of dispute.
acceptTip.ownRisk: **You carry at your own risk** until handed to recipient with validated code.

charter.title: Tripper Charter
charter.subtitle: Legal commitment — read carefully
charter.intro: By accepting this Deal, I commit to:
charter.verifyContent: **Visually inspect** the parcel content before pickup
charter.refuseSuspicious: **Refuse** any parcel not matching the declaration or appearing suspicious
charter.transportCarefully: **Transport diligently** and not alter the content
charter.deliverWithCode: **Hand over only** to the recipient after validating the 6-digit code
charter.respectCustoms: **Respect customs obligations** applicable to the trip
charter.reportIncident: **Report any incident** to Yamba without delay
charter.disclaimer: I acknowledge that my sole responsibility would be engaged in case of transport of illicit goods, even without prior verification.
charter.viewFullLink: View full Charter and Transport Contract
charter.acceptDescPrefix: I have read and accept the
charter.acceptError: You must accept the Charter to confirm this Deal

actions.footerNote: If you decline, {shipperFirstName} can look for another Tripper with no penalty.
actions.footerNoteShort: Declining doesn''t harm your reputation. {shipperFirstName} will find another Tripper.

decline.dialogIntro: {shipperFirstName} will be notified and can contact another Tripper. Your acceptance rate stays intact.
decline.toastError: Error declining the request. Try again.

accept.toastError: Error accepting the Deal. Try again.

error.notFound: This request doesn''t exist or has already been processed.
error.expired: This request has expired. You can still view it but no longer respond.
error.generic: An error occurred. Try again in a moment.
